title: Releaser Config
description: Configuration for the releaser CLI tool

versioning.description: Versioning strategy for monorepo packages. 'synchronized' bumps all packages to the same version, 'independent' allows per-package versioning.

versionSource.description: Relative path of the package whose package.json version is the source of truth for the release. Synchronized monorepos only. Defaults to the first publishable package.

packages.description: Map of relative package paths to their release configuration.

bump.description: Whether this package participates in version bumping.

publish.description: Where to publish this package. Set to false to skip publishing.

hooks.description: Shell commands to run at lifecycle points during the release process.
